problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: If mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
